title: eulophia horsfallii subsp. velayosiana
intro: Eulophia horsfallii subsp. velayosiana, also known as the Velayos' Orchid, is a subspecies of terrestrial orchid native to the Philippines. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia horsfallii subsp. velayosiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
